Author: Thomas Schätzing
Title: vs code copilot icon gone
Text:
Here is the solution that worked for me. Copilot suddenly stopped working for me on 1 specific remote server (I'm using Remote SSH plugin). So I switched to older version of Copilot (4 days ago), and then rebooted connection, that solved the problem immidiately.
Bellow is the list of things I tried and they didn't work, but you can try them for yourself:
- reboot vscode
- reinstall copilot locally and on remote server
- completely delete .vscode-server folder from remote server
rm -rf ~/.vscode-server
and then reload vs code
- sign-out from github from vs code app and sign-in again
- turned off all plugins and started only 1 plugin of copilot
My conclution: current version of copilot is buggy, I'll just wait for 2-3 weeks for new version where bug was fixed.
